description: Letter from Nissim b. Ḥalfon, from Munyat Sammanūd, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1056. Regarding wheat and flour. It is hard to get wheat, and the writer tries to provide wheat to his family, and asks Nahray for his help. Also mentions lacquer and silk. The writer is worried about his family and asks that his son, Abū l-Ḥusayn will keep studying with the teacher (al-muʿallim). (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #594) VMR
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Sammanūd. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
